## Checklist

- [ ] All CI checks pass (lint, type check, tests on 3.11/3.12/3.13, build)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets in code or tests
- [ ] Human-in-the-loop approval gate is not bypassed or weakened
- [ ] Tools remain ephemeral — no persistence, caching, or tool registries added
- [ ] Works across all supported LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, Bedrock)
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
